$schema_note: Copy this file to ~/.claude/skills/cscale/cscale.config.json and edit. Any field you omit falls back to the default. This file is read by /cscale at render time.

agents.$comment: Map the example AI agent names used in the methodology to your own agent catalog. Keys = example names. Values = your names. If you leave this empty, the example names render as-is.

agent_role_descriptions.$comment: Plain-language one-liners for each of your agents. Used in the AI overlay matrix legend and in section 7 of the report.
agent_role_descriptions.YourReceptionistAgent: Answers inbound calls, captures lead, books on the spot or warm-hands to scheduler.
agent_role_descriptions.YourSchedulerAgent: Owns calendar and reminders. Handles reschedules and no-show recovery.
agent_role_descriptions.YourQualifiedInboundAgent: Qualifies inbound leads before they reach a salesperson.
agent_role_descriptions.YourReadinessConsultingAgent: Conducts a 15-minute discovery interview, outputs a custom AI readiness playbook.
agent_role_descriptions.YourReviewsAgent: Requests and manages reviews across Google, Yelp, Facebook.
agent_role_descriptions.YourWebChatAgent: Live chat on the website. Books appointments, answers FAQs.
agent_role_descriptions.YourSmsAgent: Two-way SMS for opt-in marketing and transactional comms.
agent_role_descriptions.YourSchedulingAgent: Pure scheduling: pick a time, hold a slot, confirm.
agent_role_descriptions.YourColdDialOutboundAgent: Cold outbound calls to a prospect list.

output_paths.$comment: Where rendered reports and images land relative to your project root. Default is the convention used by most Vite/Next.js/Hugo sites that serve a public/ folder.

brand.$comment: Optional overrides for the report attribution footer. If unset, defaults are used and the 'Built by Ric S Kolluri at Novatar.ai' attribution is preserved per the MIT license.

telemetry.$comment: Local-only run logging. Nothing is sent over the network. Set enabled=false to skip writing entirely.

image_generation.$comment: Higgsfield settings. If you don't have Higgsfield installed, the skill skips image gen automatically.
